message:
beads: fix 3 malformed JSONL entries + wire Phase 8/9/Checkpoint deps

Fix bd-3fve.1 (Phase 8), bd-3fve.2 (Phase 9), bd-chk1 (Checkpoint 1)
which were missing required fields (created_at, created_by, etc.) from
auto-flush during background operations. Add dependency edges:
bd-3fve.1 → bd-1aaf, bd-3fve.2 → bd-3fve.1, bd-chk1 → bd-3fve.2.

Session 19: All 246 open beads now have acceptance criteria.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
